$description: Portable seed-product catalog for the leather-goods demo brand. App-agnostic: no vendor/shop name, status, or GraphQL logic baked in — each app applies its own defaults on top of this data. Pair with the images in ./product-images.

products.title: Square Valet Tray
products.descriptionHtml:
A compact valet tray with clean squared corners, built to keep the daily reset simple — keys, watch, wallet, and coins, all in one place by the door or on a light console.

Key details: full-grain leather; brass snap corners; removable center divider; slim silhouette that sits flat on any surface.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Round Catchall Tray
products.descriptionHtml:
A rounded catchall for the nightstand or entryway, sized for the small things that otherwise end up scattered — an integrated coin pocket and a side loop keep loose change and a pen contained.

Key details: full-grain leather; integrated coin pocket; slim pen loop; soft, rolled edge.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: 14-inch Laptop Sleeve
products.descriptionHtml:
A slim sleeve built for a 14-inch laptop, with a hidden magnetic flap that opens to a soft micro-suede lining and a flush front pocket for a notebook or a few papers.

Key details: full-grain leather; hidden magnetic closure; micro-suede interior; flush front pocket; elastic cable-keeper strap.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Tech Zipper Pouch
products.descriptionHtml:
A gusseted zipper pouch that stands upright on its own base, sized for chargers, cables, and small electronics you don't want loose in a bag.

Key details: full-grain leather; wrap-around zipper; interior elastic bands to hold coiled cables in place; gusseted, self-standing base.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Slim Card Wallet
products.descriptionHtml:
A minimal card wallet built around fast access — a diagonal quick-access slot keeps a most-used card a thumb's reach away, with a discreet pull-tab for the rest.

Key details: full-grain leather; diagonal quick-access slot; discreet pull-tab; clean, unlined edges for a slim profile.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Tri-fold Cable Organizer
products.descriptionHtml:
A fold-out organizer for the cables and small accessories that usually end up tangled in a bag — three snapped loops hold coiled cables in place, with a slim zip pocket for adapters.

Key details: full-grain leather; three snapped leather loops; slim zip pocket; wrap strap with a brass stud closure.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Key Organizer
products.descriptionHtml:
A stacked key organizer that trades a jangling ring for a quiet metal post, with a low-profile D-ring and a detachable loop for a spare fob or small charm.

Key details: full-grain leather; stacked keys on a metal post; low-profile D-ring; detachable leather loop.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Glasses Sleeve
products.descriptionHtml:
A soft-sided sleeve for glasses or sunglasses, with a magnetic top entry and a micro-suede lining that keeps lenses protected without a rigid case.

Key details: full-grain leather; magnetic top-entry closure; micro-suede interior lining; slim profile for a bag or drawer.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Desk Mouse Pad
products.descriptionHtml:
A rectangular leather mouse pad with a shallow trough along the top edge for a pencil or stylus, and a discreet cable pass-through to keep a charging cable in line.

Key details: full-grain leather top; suede underside for grip; shallow pen trough; slim cable pass-through.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Passport Travel Wallet
products.descriptionHtml:
A bifold travel wallet built around one passport and everything that goes with it — a boarding pass sleeve, two card slots, a tiny SIM/memory-card pocket, and a spine loop for a pen.

Key details: full-grain leather; boarding pass sleeve; two card slots; SIM/memory-card pocket; pen loop at the spine.

Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Forma Tote
products.descriptionHtml:
A structured trapezoid tote with clean planes and integrated oval cutout handles. Its quiet geometry and unbranded face give it a calm, Japandi-friendly presence at work or off-duty.

Key details: smooth premium leather; hidden magnetic top closure; tonal stitching; dark edge paint; lightly structured base with subtle feet.

Carry/fit: hand or crook-of-arm carry; comfortably holds daily essentials, a slim 13" laptop or tablet, notebook, and a small pouch.

Pairs with minimal, neutral wardrobes. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Linea Envelope Crossbody
products.descriptionHtml:
A slim, precision-lined envelope bag that reads refined and effortless. The single pin closure and ultra-thin strap keep the silhouette sleek.

Key details: pebbled leather for soft texture; minimalist brushed-metal pin/post closure; adjustable slim shoulder strap; tonal stitching and edge paint.

Carry/fit: essentials-first layout — phone, flat card case, keys, lipstick; ideal for dinners, galleries, and light days.

Clean lines suit Japandi minimalism. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Axis Bucket
products.descriptionHtml:
A cylindrical bucket with a seamless body and a gentle matte finish that feels architectural yet warm. Understated and balanced from every angle.

Key details: matte leather; recessed top with hidden internal drawstring; single arched handle; tonal stitching; clean, hardware-light look.

Carry/fit: compact but roomy — fits a small tablet or notebook, water bottle, wallet, and eyewear case.

Sculptural shape complements natural woods and limewashed walls. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Drift Rolltop
products.descriptionHtml:
A minimalist rolltop backpack that blends function with clarity. The silhouette stays slim, with a quiet central strap keeping the roll neatly secured.

Key details: smooth leather; low-profile magnetic clasp on the roll; concealed side zip for quick access; slim padded back panel and straps; tonal stitching.

Carry/fit: everyday commuter capacity — fits a 13–14" laptop, charger, notebook, and a light layer.

Streamlined enough for tailored looks. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Contour Brief
products.descriptionHtml:
A rounded-corner brief with softened edges and an ultra-clean face. Purpose-built for modern work setups without feeling technical.

Key details: saddle-smooth leather; flush top zipper with leather pull; slim top handles; removable thin shoulder strap with discreet anchors; micro-piped edges.

Carry/fit: slim 13" laptop, documents, tablet, and small organizer; holds shape without bulk.

A refined counterpoint to light oak desks and paper lanterns. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Verge Sling
products.descriptionHtml:
An asymmetrical teardrop sling designed for dynamic, hands-free carry. The diagonal zip keeps access intuitive and the profile minimal.

Key details: smooth leather; concealed diagonal zipper; wide adjustable strap anchored off-center; ultra-minimal hardware; tonal stitching.

Carry/fit: compact setup — phone, wallet, sunglasses, in-ears, passport, and an e-reader.

Looks intentional worn front or back. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Fold Clutch
products.descriptionHtml:
A crisp fold-over clutch that moves effortlessly from day to night. The fold line creates a subtle highlight that feels refined and timeless.

Key details: smooth leather; internal magnetic fold closure; tonal stitching; dark edge paint; rear slip pocket sized for a phone.

Carry/fit: phone, card case, keys, slim power bank, and a small cosmetic item.

Easy to perch on linen, wood, or tatami. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Orbit Duffel
products.descriptionHtml:
A tubular duffel with uninterrupted lines and discreet end-cap pockets. Designed for short getaways and stylish gym transitions.

Key details: lightly structured leather body; flush end-cap pockets; double low-profile handles; detachable slim shoulder strap; subtle base feet; tonal stitching.

Carry/fit: 24–48 hour capacity — change of clothes, sneakers, dopp kit, tablet, chargers.

Calm presence on jute runners and pale wood floors. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Arc Belt Bag
products.descriptionHtml:
A curved belt bag that hugs the body, disappearing into clean outfits. The hidden zipper under a slim lip keeps the face uninterrupted.

Key details: medium-grain leather; hidden top zip; adjustable leather belt with a low-profile quick-release buckle; tonal stitching and edge paint.

Carry/fit: phone, card case, keys, compact sanitizer, and earbuds.

Wear at the waist or crossbody, pairing with natural fibers and soft, neutral palettes. Available in brown, red, or black leather.

products.title: Luna Hobo
products.descriptionHtml:
A soft crescent hobo with a gentle drape and a single knotted strap. The arc reads relaxed yet deliberate — an everyday staple with presence.

Key details: supple leather; magnetic top closure tucked under the arc; sueded underside peeking at the knot; tonal stitching; minimal hardware.

Carry/fit: generous daily carry — wallet, makeup pouch, book, tablet, scarf, and a small water bottle.

Effortlessly at home near shoji screens, paper lamps, and light-oak tables. Available in brown, red, or black leather.
